articles.title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
articles.summary: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin shares top priorities for new 'Lean Ethereum' strawmap
articles.summary: Part of the Ethereum Foundation’s plan to make Ethereum more private and scalable is to introduce a new virtual machine, with leanISA and RISC-V among the top candidates.

articles.title: Moonbeam to pivot from Polkadot to Base, unveils AI agent framework
articles.summary: Moonbeam didn’t provide a timeline for when it would launch the AI agent platform but told GLMR holders to bridge their tokens from the Polkadot parachain to Base before July 31.

articles.title: Kraken lets traders use tokenized stocks as collateral for leveraged trades
articles.summary: Eligible users can now use select tokenized stocks and ETFs as collateral for futures and margin trading without selling their holdings.

articles.title: Kalshi hits record June trading volume as World Cup fuels prediction markets
articles.summary: DefiLlama data shows Kalshi posted a record month for trading volume as the expanded FIFA World Cup boosted prediction market activity.

articles.title: Bollinger Bands creator eyes Bitcoin bear-market end, 'W'-shaped reversal
articles.summary: Bitcoin price strength could "break" the entire downtrend if the reversal pattern completed, John Bollinger suggested in light of the BTC rebound.

articles.title: Revolut to delist USDT in August, citing regulatory and risk concerns
articles.summary: Revolut notified some customers it will delist USDT after Aug. 31, with remaining holdings automatically converted into users’ base currency.

articles.title: Tim Draper says Arkham got Bitcoin wallet attribution ‘wrong’
articles.summary: Tim Draper disputes Arkham's Bitcoin wallet attribution, saying: “I haven’t touched it. Arkham has it wrong.”

articles.title: Bitcoin profit and loss ratio falls to 43-month low

articles.title: US law enforcement group drops opposition to CLARITY Act: Report
articles.summary: The Major County Sheriffs of America said it still wants the CLARITY Act amended to give local law enforcement more resources to investigate illicit finance cases.

articles.title: Bitcoin, Ether extend relief rallies as extreme fear meets renewed ETF buying
articles.summary: Bitcoin and Ether bounced off multi-year lows as dip buyers finally stepped in, and the spot BTC ETFs saw a $221 million inflow on July 2.

articles.title: SOL rallies as Solana memecoins, prediction market activity surge: Are bulls back?
articles.summary: Rising interest in Solana-network memecoins and prediction markets was followed by a rally in SOL price. Will the momentum continue?

articles.title: US senator calls for ban on elected officials issuing memecoins
articles.summary: The restriction proposed by Senator Kirsten Gillibrand would bar members of Congress, the US president and their spouses from “issuing or sponsoring their own digital assets.”

articles.title: Donald Trump says ‘nothing wrong’ with $1.4B crypto windfall while in office
articles.summary: The US President disclosed earning more than $1 billion from crypto ventures amid discussions of a digital asset market structure bill in Congress and legislation to ban CBDCs awaiting his desk.

articles.title: ESMA warns many prediction market event contracts already face EU retail ban
articles.summary: The European regulator said companies cannot circumvent EU financial rules by marketing binary-style products as event contracts rather than derivatives.

articles.title: Bitcoin price tags $62.3K nine-day high after global stocks hit historic record

articles.title: EU crypto rulebook faces enforcement challenge as MiCA transition ends
articles.summary: Lawyers and industry executives expect EU regulators to enforce MiCA differently as unauthorized crypto companies are required to wind down operations.

articles.title: Upbit says it only expressed interest in future OUSD participation
articles.summary: Upbit said it only expressed interest in potentially joining the OpenStandard ecosystem in the future, as several South Korean firms distanced themselves from the OUSD initiative.

articles.title: Belgian police arrest suspected phishing gang leader tied to $572K theft
articles.summary: Belgian authorities say a European phishing gang stole over $572,000 from victims before laundering the proceeds through cryptocurrency.

articles.title: StanChart joins ESMA's first MiCA register update since deadline
articles.summary: ESMA publishes its first post-deadline MiCA register update, adding 37 crypto-asset service providers, including Standard Chartered and FalconX.

articles.title: Bitcoin supply metric prints first 'buy' signal since late 2022 as bear market continues
articles.summary: Bitcoin supply dynamics pointed toward the end of the 2026 bear market after the first "buy" signal since November 2022, but analysis warned that BTC price could still go lower.<

articles.title: Zcash’s Ironwood upgrade faces possible delay over infrastructure readiness
articles.summary: Shielded Labs said exchanges, mining pools and wallets may need more time to complete Zcash’s Z3 software migration and safely prepare for Ironwood.

articles.title: Defendant files to dismiss New York lawsuit seeking ownership of 39,069 Bitcoin wallets
articles.summary: A defendant who owns one of the dormant Bitcoin wallets filed to dismiss the New York case, which seeks ownership of $229 billion worth of Bitcoin considered lost.

articles.title: India's central bank revives push to isolate banks from crypto: Report
articles.summary: The Indian central bank reportedly urged lawmakers to keep banks insulated from crypto and private stablecoins while preserving room for regulated tokenization.</

articles.title: Irish authorities seize another 500 Bitcoin, bringing 2026 total to 1,500 BTC
articles.summary: Irish authorities recovered 500 Bitcoin in criminal proceeds, bringing the total seized by the Criminal Assets Bureau to about $92 million in BTC for 2026.

articles.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs top $200M in daily inflows for first time since May
articles.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $221.7 million inflows, the strongest daily intake since early May, as Bitcoin recovers above $61,000.

articles.title: Teen ‘Scattered Spider’ suspect extradited to US over $8M crypto ransom
articles.summary: Peter Stokes, 19, has been charged in the US for allegedly taking part in a hacking group’s unsuccessful $8 million crypto ransom scheme.
